## Summary

- What changed and why
- Link to public context (issue/RFC/docs)

## Milestone Checklist (MVP LLaDA2.0)

- [ ] Issue + phase declared (example: `Related: #20`, `Phase 0`)
- [ ] HARD dependencies listed and status noted
- [ ] SOFT dependencies listed and status noted
- [ ] In-scope work stated
- [ ] Out-of-scope work stated
- [ ] Validation evidence included (tests/manual checks)
- [ ] Docs impact stated (updated or N/A with reason)

### Issue and Phase

- Related issue(s): #
- Closing keyword (only if fully resolved): Closes #
- Phase: 0-6

### Dependencies

- HARD:
- SOFT:

### Scope

- In scope:
- Out of scope:

### Validation Evidence

- Commands run:
- Result:

### Docs Impact

- Files updated:
- If none, reason:
